description:
Clean & minimal wallpaper app without any ads and paywall.
WallApp is a lightweight Android app for browsing wallpapers from https://thewallapp.pages.dev.

TheWallApp is my personal wallpaper website, designed to be clean, simple, and free from ads.

Features:

- Lightweight and fast
- No ads
- Browse and download wallpapers
- Set wallpapers directly from the app


WallApp does not collect, store, or share any personal data.
